zh.Headington, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾希阿丁頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Andilicia de Beauchamp於大約1155年出生在英國賀特福爾時，她的父親Sir Hugh Beauchamp 1st Baron de Beauchamp47歲，母親Lady Phillippa de Trailly22歲。她於1169年之前與William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank在英國爾結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1185年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾享年31歲。

zh-hans.Headington, Oxfordshire, England: 英国奧可福爾希阿丁頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andilicia de Beauchamp于大约1155年出生在英国賀特福爾时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Beauchamp 1st Baron de Beauchamp47岁，母亲Lady Phillippa de Trailly22岁。她于1169年之前与William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank在英国爾结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1185年在英国英格兰奧可福爾享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Beachum
meanings: Altered form of English   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: English:
possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

en.lifeSummary: When Andilicia de Beauchamp was born about 1155, in Hertfordshire, England, her father, Sir Hugh Beauchamp 1st Baron de Beauchamp, was 47 and her mother, Lady Phillippa de Trailly, was 22. She married William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank before 1169, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died in 1185, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andilicia de Beauchamp est née environ 1155, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Beauchamp 1st Baron de Beauchamp, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Lady Phillippa de Trailly, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank avant 1169, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1185, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andilicia de Beauchamp um 1155 in Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Beauchamp 1st Baron de Beauchamp 47 und ihre Mutter Lady Phillippa de Trailly 22. Sie hat vor 1169 in Cheshire, England William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1185 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andilicia de Beauchamp è nata il circa 1155 nel Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Hugh Beauchamp 1st Baron de Beauchamp, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Lady Phillippa de Trailly, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank prima del 1169, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì nel 1185, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Andilicia de Beauchampが約1155年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Beauchamp 1st Baron de Beauchampは47歳，母Lady Phillippa de Traillyは22歳であった。1169年以前にイギリスチェシュアイアでWilliam Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbankと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1185年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Andilicia de Beauchamp(이)가 대략 1155년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Beauchamp 1st Baron de Beauchamp(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Phillippa de Trailly(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1169년 이전 영국 체실르에서 William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1185년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andilicia de Beauchamp nasceu aproximadamente 1155, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Beauchamp 1st Baron de Beauchamp, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Lady Phillippa de Trailly, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank antes 1169, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1185, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andilicia de Beauchamp родилась около 1155 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Beauchamp 1st Baron de Beauchamp было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Phillippa de Trailly, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank перед 1169 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1185 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andilicia de Beauchamp nació aproximadamente 1155, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Beauchamp 1st Baron de Beauchamp, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Lady Phillippa de Trailly, tenía 22 años. Se casó con William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank antes de 1169, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió en 1185, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años.
